title: Absolute QSEC Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: The Fair Work Ombudsman alleges Cairns-based security company Absolute QSEC Pty Ltd failed to comply with a February 2025 Fair Work Commission order to pay $9,333 in compensation plus superannuation to a casual security officer found to have been unfairly dismissed, and has sought a court order for payment plus interest.
scope: Alleged failure to comply with a Fair Work Commission order to pay compensation to an unfairly dismissed worker; Fair Work Ombudsman has sought a court order to enforce payment plus interest
